phonetic: p瑟藞d蕦艐kj蕣l瑟t; p瑟藞d蕦艐kj蕣le瑟t
phoneticUs: pi藧藞d蕦艐kjul瑟t; pi藧藞d蕦艐kju藢le瑟t
meaning: adj.鏈夎姳姊楃殑,鏈夎倝鑼庣殑
examples: Male flowers in clusters or forming pedunculate capitula.
Male inflorescences a capitulum, 6-10 mm in diam., pedunculate.
Wings of nutlet ca. 1/2 as wide as nutlet or more; female inflorescence pedunculate.
